human_approval.approval_statement: I approve broadcasting txid 27d0e850…8527 to Zcash mainnet.

broadcast.path: zcash-devtool pczt send (P0-018 pre-Ironwood compatibility binary, base commit 1b065594d958d1cad2deafe7cd2e2fcc2774c46c)

confirmation_rule.SUBMITTED: pinned pczt send exited 0 and echoed the txid
confirmation_rule.OBSERVED: the wallet's own light-client sync via zec.rocks lists the txid in wallet list-tx
confirmation_rule.MINED: wallet list-tx reports a mined height for the txid
confirmation_rule.CONFIRMED: observed chain tip height >= mined height + 2 (three confirmations including the mining block)

chronology.evidence: send process started 14:53:58.727Z, exited 0 at 14:54:20.033Z echoing the txid
first post-broadcast wallet sync listed the txid in wallet list-tx
wallet list-tx reported mined height 3409837 (block time 2026-07-12T14:54:27Z)
observed chain tip 3409840 >= 3409837 + 2 (4 confirmations at observation)

outputs.classification: self-send payment back to the vault's own Orchard address

budget_ledger.note: The two new 5000-zatoshi notes are wallet-observed but reported non-spendable until they reach the wallet's note-maturity confirmation depth; no funds are missing.

boundaries.additional_broadcasts: none; exactly one transaction was broadcast, matching the approved txid
boundaries.next_gate: explicit human approval before ZSAFE-P0-024 (freeze the verified mainnet run fixture)
